pages.title: Meteor Scythe
pages.text: An AOE harvester. Sweeps a $(6)4×4×4$() cube of $(item)Leaves$() and $(item)IPlantable$()-type blocks (crops, saplings, flowers) around the targeted block.$(br2)Faster than manual clearing; durable enough to landscape a forest in one go.

pages.title: Meteor Hammer
pages.text: Breaks a $(6)3×3$() plane of blocks in one swing, oriented to the face you're looking at. Mining speed scales with tier — pairs with $(item)Efficiency$() enchantments for quarry work.$(br2)Costs durability per block broken (not per swing), so large hits drain fast.

pages.title: Meteor Bow
pages.text: Higher base damage than vanilla bow; draws a touch faster. Takes standard bow enchantments (Power, Punch, Flame, Infinity).
